title: arrhenatherum elatius subsp. elatius
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius subsp. elatius, also known as the tall melic or melic grass, is a perennial grass species that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Arrhenatherum elatius subsp. elatius can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies.
